name: availability: an existing HOURLY booking blocks an overlapping OVERNIGHT enquiry on the same room (B9/F17)
comment: Proof that the two booking types share one availability system rather than two parallel ones. recB0 is a 3-hour short stay today 14:00-17:00 SAST on the only room; the overnight guest wants today 14:00 through tomorrow 10:00, which swallows that window whole. B8's findAvailableRoom is reused unforked, so this falls out of the datetime comparison with no hourly-specific logic — the only reason it works is that hourly writes real datetimes into the same Check In/Check Out fields.
